/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/hwckr.dir/hwckr_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwckr.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwckr.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o -o hwckr  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.6.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.6.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.6.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so
